name: Acuant Identity Document Verification and IAM REST API
what_it_does: Acuant identity document verification and identity assurance REST API for financial institutions, government agencies, healthcare providers, and online platforms in North America and globally to verify identity documents, perform biometric authentication, detect document fraud, and match identities across digital and physical channels — enabling automated identity proofing, KYC compliance, and access control through Acuant's AI-powered document authentication and identity platform now part of IDEMIA. Enables AI agents to manage document capture for identity document scanning automation, handle document authentication for fraud detection and authenticity automation, access face match for selfie-to-document biometric verification automation, retrieve data extraction for document OCR and field parsing automation, manage liveness detection for passive liveness anti-spoofing automation, handle identity proofing for NIST 800-63 Level of Assurance automation, access database verification for SSN and identity data cross-check automation, retrieve risk assessment for identity fraud risk scoring automation, manage workflow for multi-step identity verification orchestration automation, and integrate Acuant with onboarding, KYC, and access management platforms for identity assurance automation.
use_cases: Verifying identity documents and biometrics for bank account opening KYC compliance automation agents
Performing identity proofing for NIST 800-63 IAL2 compliance in government digital services automation agents
Detecting document fraud and forgery for regulated industry customer onboarding automation agents
Integrating identity verification into age verification for age-restricted commerce automation agents
not_for: Non-document-based authentication (Acuant focuses on document + biometric identity verification)
B2C identity management (Acuant provides identity proofing infrastructure to enterprises, not consumer IAM)
Pure watchlist screening (Acuant is document verification, not AML or sanctions screening)
best_when: A US bank, government agency, healthcare provider, or online platform wanting AI agents to verify identity documents, perform biometric face matching, detect document fraud, and achieve NIST 800-63 identity proofing through Acuant's document authentication platform.
avoid_when: ACUANT IS NOW PART OF IDEMIA: Acuant was acquired by IDEMIA in 2023; automated independent Acuant product assumption creates product_roadmap_uncertainty as IDEMIA consolidates product lines; automated should verify current IDEMIA/Acuant product availability. DOCUMENT TYPE COVERAGE VARIES: Acuant has strong US/Canadian document coverage but international coverage varies; automated global document assumption creates lower_accuracy for non-North American documents; automated must verify country coverage for specific national ID types. PASSIVE LIVENESS IS NOT ACTIVE: Acuant passive liveness detects spoofing from still images; automated passive liveness as full 3D face verification assumption creates vulnerability to sophisticated 3D spoofing; automated must evaluate active liveness for high-security use cases. NIST 800-63 COMPLIANCE REQUIRES IMPLEMENTATION: Achieving NIST 800-63 IAL2 requires specific process controls beyond API calls; automated API-only NIST compliance assumption creates compliance_gap for government digital services; automated must implement complete NIST 800-63 process including identity proofing procedures.

auth.notes: Acuant uses API key + Basic Auth for identity REST API. REST API with JSON. Los Angeles, CA HQ (acquired by IDEMIA 2023). Founded 1999. Products: AssureID (document authentication), FaceID (biometric), iProov passive liveness, Ozone document forensics. SDKs: JS, Android, iOS, .NET. Strong US identity document coverage. Now part of IDEMIA Smart Identity portfolio. Competes with Jumio and AU10TIX for US identity document verification.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Trial environment for evaluation; production requires IDEMIA/Acuant enterprise agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction verification fees; volume discounts; enterprise annual contracts
pricing.notes: Los Angeles CA. IDEMIA subsidiary since 2023. Per-transaction fees. US/global identity verification.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; document processing and face match throttled per account tier

known_agent_gotchas: ACQUISITION TRANSITION: Acuant is being integrated into IDEMIA; automated stable-independent-Acuant assumption creates product_evolution as IDEMIA consolidates; automated should monitor IDEMIA product announcements for Acuant platform changes

DOCUMENT IMAGE REQUIREMENTS ARE STRICT: Acuant requires specific image capture guidelines (DPI, lighting, angle); automated any-image assumption creates low_quality_rejection; automated must implement Acuant SDK for proper document capture guidance

FRONT AND BACK REQUIRED FOR MOST IDs: US driver's licenses require both front and back for complete verification; automated front-only assumption creates incomplete_verification for IDs with back-side machine-readable zones; automated must capture and submit both sides

CLASSIFICATION BEFORE AUTHENTICATION: Acuant workflow requires document classification before authentication; automated direct-authentication assumption creates classification_required error; automated must implement classification → authentication → face match workflow sequence

RESULTS REQUIRE HUMAN REVIEW INTEGRATION: Acuant provides risk scores but borderline cases require human review; automated automated-pass-all assumption creates fraud_risk from borderline documents; automated must implement review queue for documents below confidence threshold
agent_readiness.security_notes: Identity document verification. NIST 800-63, SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. API key. US/EU. Document and biometric identity data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Identity verification. NIST 800-63, SOC2. API key. US/EU. Document and biometric identity data.
